response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio matches the general description of the scenes and the chant/improvised song about 'Chicken' (though it is a simpler rhythmic chant than Jack Black's lyrics). 2. JSON Usage: The JSON reference list of scenes was used to guide character actions and goals. Manual transcription was applied for the exact chanted lyrics and dialogue, since she was chanting 'Chicken, chicken' and talking about mushrooms instead of singing the specific Jack Black song verses. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were aligned with high precision to her vocalizations. Silence and minor background noise were omitted to prevent lingering subtitles.

subtitles.original: I should also put this shulker down.
subtitles.english: I should also put this shulker down.

subtitles.original: Okay. One goal I do have today...
subtitles.english: Okay. One goal I do have today...

subtitles.original: And to do that, I do need some wheat.
subtitles.english: And to do that, I do need some wheat.

subtitles.original: Na, na, na... I was thinking maybe I should like...
subtitles.english: Na, na, na... I was thinking maybe I should like...

subtitles.original: ...fence off the farm so that the monsters won't come in and ruin it again.
subtitles.english: ...fence off the farm so that the monsters won't come in and ruin it again.

subtitles.original: Oh, the seeds, not the actual wheat? Oh, right, right!
subtitles.english: Oh, the seeds, not the actual wheat? Oh, right, right!

subtitles.original: Where would I find the chickens though? I've seen a lot of sheep, I've seen some cows,
subtitles.english: Where would I find the chickens though? I've seen a lot of sheep, I've seen some cows,

subtitles.original: I've seen some pigs. I haven't seen chickens, I think.
subtitles.english: I've seen some pigs. I haven't seen chickens, I think.

subtitles.original: I guess I'll put it here.
subtitles.english: I guess I'll put it here.

subtitles.original: We'll adventure a little bit. Did I make a shield?
subtitles.english: We'll adventure a little bit. Did I make a shield?

subtitles.original: I did not. Ah, it's fine.
subtitles.english: I did not. Ah, it's fine.

subtitles.original: It's still daytime. We have plenty of time.
subtitles.english: It's still daytime. We have plenty of time.

subtitles.original: We have, we have, we have a combat support bee.
subtitles.english: We have, we have, we have a combat support bee.

subtitles.original: Surely it can help us somehow.
subtitles.english: Surely it can help us somehow.

subtitles.original: Chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken...

subtitles.original: Chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken...
subtitles.english: Chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken...

subtitles.english: Where are all the chickens at?

subtitles.original: I guess they... chicken'd out. Ahahaha!
subtitles.english: I guess they... chicken'd out. Ahahaha!

subtitles.original: I guess I have to go to plains.
subtitles.english: I guess I have to go to plains.

subtitles.english: Chi-chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken...

subtitles.english: Chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken, chicken...

subtitles.english: Listen closely, guys. You gotta hear the go-go-go... go-go-go...

subtitles.original: Is someone living here? Or at least they...
subtitles.english: Is someone living here? Or at least they...

subtitles.original: At least they put all the... Ah! Chicken, chicken!
subtitles.english: At least they put all the... Ah! Chicken, chicken!
